nasb.text: Indeed, the seller will not regain what he sold as long as they both live; for the vision regarding all their multitude will not be averted, nor will any of them maintain his life by his iniquity.

esv.text: For the seller shall not return to what he has sold, while they live. For the vision concerns all their multitude; it shall not turn back; and because of his iniquity, none can maintain his life.

cnv.text: 賣的人雖然還活著， 卻不能得回所賣的。 因為這個關乎眾人的異象必不更改。 因為罪孽的緣故，沒有人能保全自己的性命。

ccb.text: 即使卖主活着，也无法赎回他所卖的，因为关乎每一个人的异象必然应验，他们因为犯罪一个也不能保存性命。
